org.egothor.stemmer.StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow

Packages that use StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow
Package
Description
org.egothor.stemmer
Provides the core Egothor-style stemming infrastructure based on compact patch-command tries.

  • Uses of StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow in org.egothor.stemmer

    Methods in org.egothor.stemmer that return types with arguments of type StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow>
    StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.evaluate(Reader reader, String sourceDescription, String languageLabel, long seed)
    Evaluates a dictionary provided through an arbitrary reader.
    List<StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow>
    StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.evaluateAllBundledLanguages(long seed)
    Evaluates all supported bundled dictionaries using the supplied seed.
    List<StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow>
    StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.evaluateBundledLanguage(StemmerPatchTrieLoader.Language language, long seed)
    Evaluates one bundled dictionary across all supported experiment configurations.
    List<StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow>
    StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.evaluatePath(Path dictionaryPath, long seed)
    Evaluates one filesystem dictionary across all supported experiment configurations.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.writeCsv(Path outputPath, List<StemmerKnowledgeExperiment.ResultRow> rows)
    Writes result rows as UTF-8 CSV with a stable fixed header.
